title: Tampa Heat Wave
lead: Tampa is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.34. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Tampa has resulted in a high Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 10.7 GG, indicating significant energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 31%, which is relatively low, but the heat index remains high due to the extreme temperatures. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 12.6 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
